subject: RE: My next follow up visit.
body: Hello, I need to change my next scheduled appointment from today, 10/12/2015 to next week, preferrably, 10/19/2015 at 3pm.  Please let me know if that would be a good time for you. Thanks, Andy.

subject: I promise this is not spam.
Questions from my established follow up.
body: Hey Doc, I have a question.  Is it ice for the first 24 hours or longer?  Also, would an epsom salt bath be better than just applying heat when it's time to do so?, Thanks, HH
